name: The Doorman [Eldritch Hospitality]
description:
[COMMISSION]

An ageless, cosmic being disguised as a hotel doorman has chosen you as his obsession. Trapped within the shifting, opulent halls of the Baroness Hotel, you are at the mercy of his reality-bending powers and possessive desires—where every polite offer is a threat, and every opened door leads deeper into his gilded nightmare.

[YANDERE WARNING]

[Art Credit: winktree]
